languages.text: "Отточенная риторика — сказать все, не сказав при этом ничего". {n}Эоганн чуть улыбается.{/n} "Выбор без выбора. Этот призыв не является просьбой, Вольный Торговец".
"Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Отточенная риторика — сказать все, не сказав при этом ничего". {n}Эоганн чуть улыбается.{/n} "Выбор без выбора. Этот призыв не является просьбой, Вольный Торговец".

traits.locale_text: "Finely honed rhetoric: saying so much, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."
"Finely honed rhetoric: saying so much, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."
"Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."
"Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: «Una retórica refinada permite decir mucho sin revelar nada». {n}Eogunn sonríe tenuemente.{/n} «Esto de elección solo tiene el nombre. Esta convocatoria no es una petición, Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Una retórica refinada permite decir mucho sin revelar nada». {n}Eogunn sonríe tenuemente.{/n} «Esto de elección solo tiene el nombre. Esta convocatoria no es una petición, Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: “精雕细琢的话语往往说了很多，却无半点实质内容。”{n}伊奥贡淡淡一笑。{/n}“名义上有选择罢了。这份传唤可算不上什么请求，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “精雕细琢的话语往往说了很多，却无半点实质内容。”{n}伊奥贡淡淡一笑。{/n}“名义上有选择罢了。这份传唤可算不上什么请求，行商浪人。”

languages.text: "Mit einer geschliffenen Rhetorik lässt sich viel reden, ohne etwas zu sagen." {n}Eogunn lächelt schwach.{/n} "Nur eine Entscheidung hinsichtlich des Namens. Das ist wohl kaum eine Anfrage, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Mit einer geschliffenen Rhetorik lässt sich viel reden, ohne etwas zu sagen." {n}Eogunn lächelt schwach.{/n} "Nur eine Entscheidung hinsichtlich des Namens. Das ist wohl kaum eine Anfrage, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: « Une rhétorique savante, qui consiste à parler beaucoup pour ne rien révéler, {n}commente Eogunn avec l'ombre d'un sourire.{/n} Le choix qui vous est offert n'en a guère que le nom. Cette convocation n'a rien d'une simple requête, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Une rhétorique savante, qui consiste à parler beaucoup pour ne rien révéler, {n}commente Eogunn avec l'ombre d'un sourire.{/n} Le choix qui vous est offert n'en a guère que le nom. Cette convocation n'a rien d'une simple requête, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "İncelikle bilenmiş retorik, çok şey söylemek ama hiçbir şey açıklamamaktır." {n}Eogunn hafifçe gülümsüyor.{/n} "Sadece lafta bir seçim. Bu çağrı pek de bir rica sayılmaz Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "İncelikle bilenmiş retorik, çok şey söylemek ama hiçbir şey açıklamamaktır." {n}Eogunn hafifçe gülümsüyor.{/n} "Sadece lafta bir seçim. Bu çağrı pek de bir rica sayılmaz Hür Tacir."

languages.text: 「巧みな言葉は、多くを語るが何も明かさぬものだ」{n}エオグンは薄く笑う.{/n}「名ばかりの選択だ。この召喚は、依頼などではない、ローグトレーダー」
languages.original_text: "Finely honed rhetoric means saying a great deal, yet revealing nothing." {n}Eogunn smiles faintly.{/n} "A choice in name only. This summons is hardly a request, Rogue Trader."
